properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.enabled
properties.description: Whether the autoconfiguration optimizer is enabled. When enabled and a training file is present, only the listed auto-configurations will be loaded. Default: {@code true}

properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.exit-after-training
properties.description: Whether to exit the application after a training run completes. Useful when the application is started solely for the training run. Default: {@code false}

properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.output-directory
properties.description: The output directory for the training run results file. Default: {@code .} (current working directory)

properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.output-file
properties.description: The name of the output file for the training run results. Default: {@code autoconfiguration-optimizer.properties}

properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.training-run
properties.description: Whether this is a training run. During a training run, all auto-configurations are loaded and the ones that are active are recorded to a file. Use {@code TRAINING_RUN_JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS} to set this during build. Default: {@code false}
